name: dedao-daily-note
title: 得到每日笔记
description: Append timestamped entries to a daily note in 得到大脑.
author: geekmai

commands.name: instant-capture
commands.title: 快速添加到每日笔记
commands.subtitle: 得到每日笔记
commands.description: Append text from Root Search to today's 得到大脑 daily note.

commands.name: append-daily-note
commands.title: 追加到今日笔记
commands.description: Append a timestamped entry to today's 得到大脑 daily note.

commands.name: append-clipboard
commands.title: 追加剪贴板到今日笔记
commands.description: Append clipboard text to today's 得到大脑 daily note.

commands.name: view-today-note
commands.title: 查看今日笔记
commands.description: Load today's 得到大脑 daily note.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: 得到大脑 OpenAPI Authorization header.

preferences.name: clientId
preferences.title: Client ID
preferences.description: 得到大脑 OpenAPI X-Client-ID header.

preferences.name: topicId
preferences.title: 知识库 ID
preferences.description: 可选。创建新的每日笔记时保存到指定知识库；留空则保存到默认笔记空间。已存在的每日笔记不会自动迁移。

preferences.name: tags
preferences.title: 标签
preferences.description: 创建每日笔记时添加的标签，多个标签用英文或中文逗号分隔。

preferences.name: timezone
preferences.title: 时区
preferences.description: 用于生成每日笔记标题和时间戳。

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: 得到大脑 OpenAPI base URL.
